name: Diabetes Mellitus Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for diabetes mellitus types 1 and 2, including codes with and without complications. Used for denominator identification in diabetes care measures (CDC, kidney, eye exam, statin).
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Diabetes mellitus due to underlying condition without complications
Drug or chemical induced diabetes mellitus without complications
Type 1 diabetes mellitus with ketoacidosis without coma
Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic chronic kidney disease
Type 2 diabetes mellitus with unspecified diabetic retinopathy without macular edema
Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic neuropathy, unspecified
Type 2 diabetes mellitus with diabetic peripheral angiopathy without gangrene
Type 2 diabetes mellitus with foot ulcer
Other specified diabetes mellitus without complications
Other specified diabetes mellitus with hyperglycemia
